title: 2 BHK House for Rent in Vidyanagar
description: A bright, east-facing 2 BHK independent house in the heart of Vidyanagar. Semi-furnished with a modular kitchen, large balcony and dedicated parking for a car and bike. Walking distance to schools, supermarkets and the Vidyanagar bus stop.

faq.question: Is this property suitable for bachelors?
faq.answer: Yes, bachelors are allowed. Families are preferred.

faq.question: Is parking available?
faq.answer: Yes, dedicated parking for one car and one bike is included.

faq.question: Is the house Vastu compliant?
faq.answer: Yes, the house is east-facing and Vastu compliant.
